name: @geosuite/sitemap-builder
description: Crawl a website and emit a valid sitemap.xml — for sites that ship without one or whose CMS pipeline forgot to.
author: Matteo Perino <matte97.p@gmail.com> (https://github.com/matte97p)

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/crawler.js && node --check src/sitemap.js && node --check src/ai.js && node --check bin/cli.js && node --check test/test-sitemap.js && node --check test/test-crawler.js && node --check test/test-ai.js
